title: Lucerne、Lucerne — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Lucerne、Lucerneの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

LucerneはLucerneにある人口82,000の都市です。A picture-perfect city on Lake Lucerne surrounded by snow-capped Alps, famous for its Chapel Bridge, Lion Monument, and the annual Lucerne Festival.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
